name: Hanson Dev
tagline: Expert software engineering for developers and businesses who demand precision.
description: Hanson Dev is a personal brand for a software engineer specializing in high-precision development services. The visual identity conveys technical excellence, stability, and professional credibility through a deep blue palette and clean typography.

logo.notes: Logo is a circular badge with 'HD' initials. Optimized for dark backgrounds; use navy variant on light backgrounds. Maintain 50% clear space. Minimum 32px digital.

colors.name: Midnight Blue
colors.usage: primary page canvas — deep, focused canvas for developer/technical context

colors.name: Deep Navy
colors.usage: cards, panels, secondary surfaces — adds depth and hierarchy

colors.name: Sky Blue
colors.usage: brand accent — CTAs, logo center, highlights, interactive elements

colors.name: Light Text
colors.usage: body text and headings on dark backgrounds

colors.name: Muted Blue
colors.usage: secondary text, metadata, placeholders on dark surfaces

colors.name: Navy Border
colors.usage: rules, dividers, input borders on dark surfaces

colors.name: Steel Blue
colors.usage: secondary accent — hover states, secondary CTAs, supporting highlights

voice.tone: Speaks as an expert practitioner. Uses facts and clear logic over hype. Helpful and approachable while maintaining technical excellence standards.
messagingPillars: Precision — Every line of code and design choice is intentional
Technical Excellence — We don't just build; we optimize and master
Reliability — A brand that stands for stability and trust

imagery.style: Clean, line-based iconography; high-quality technical setups; abstract data visualizations
imagery.treatment: Professional and focused. Technical authenticity over polish. Real code and real outputs preferred over idealized illustrations.
avoid: Stock photos of people pointing at screens
Excessive use of gradients or decorative elements

postureRules: Deep midnight blue primary background creates focused, professional canvas
Cards use Deep Navy (#1A365D) surfaces with subtle border separation
Sky Blue accent used sparingly for CTAs, highlights, and interactive elements
Component kit covers: Button, Card, Form Fields, Navigation, Code Block, Feature Grid, Testimonial, CTA Section
